title: Hapan Water Dragon
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Water|more=Dragon (disambiguation)}}
The '''Hapan Water Dragon''', also known as a '''Wavespeeder''', was an [[Ocean/Legends|ocean]] [[Transport/Legends|transport]] used by the [[Hapan]] royal family. It was capable of traveling across the ocean at top speeds.

In [[23 ABY/Legends|23 ABY]], the young [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] trainee and heir to the Hapan throne, [[Tenel Ka Djo]], along with her grandmother [[Queen Mother]] [[Ta'a Chume]] and her Jedi companions used a Water Dragon to travel in the oceans of [[Hapes/Legends|Hapes]].

Unfortunately, the treacherous [[Ambassador/Legends|Ambassador]] [[Yfra]] arranged for the vehicle to be blown up. However, Tenel Ka, the Queen Mother and their [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] companions survived the attack. They would also survive a patch of [[carnivorous seaweed]] which had been planted nearby by Yfra.

==Appearances==
*''[[Young Jedi Knights: Lightsabers]]''
